title: refactor: split AuthProvider transport from credential injection
description:
## Problem
AuthProvider conflates two concerns: HTTP client construction (TLS trust roots, connect timeouts) and per-request credential injection (Authorization header). Three of four impls call default_reqwest_client() because they have no transport variation — the method is boilerplate tax. Anyone needing mTLS + Bearer must fuse both concerns into one type. The blanket impls on Box<dyn> and Arc<dyn> exist only to paper over this coupling.

## Solution
Separate into two traits: one for transport config (build_client), one for credential injection (auth_header). JmapChatClient::new accepts both independently, enabling composition of any transport with any auth scheme without a combined type.

## Acceptance
- Existing auth impls (NoneAuth, BearerAuth, BasicAuth, CustomCaAuth) still work
- mTLS + Bearer is composable without writing a combined struct
- default_reqwest_client() helper is eliminated or scoped to the transport trait
